key_signals: Top holder controls 70.79% of supply — extreme dump risk
Pump.fun bonding curve with thin $5.7k market liquidity
Token metadata pointer immutable — no rugpull-via-metadata attack vector
verdicts.reasoning: The contract itself is structurally clean — mint and freeze authorities are both renounced and the token has no transfer-hook backdoor. But the single 70.79% holder combined with razor-thin liquidity means the on-chain plumbing is irrelevant: one wallet can collapse the price in a single transaction. Honest contract, dishonest distribution.

key_signals: Coordinated launch shilling: 9 accounts posted within a 2-hour window
Most reply-guys are <30-day-old accounts with anime PFPs
Creator's X handle silent since launch peak
Telegram velocity falling: -42% messages/hour in the last 4h
No mainstream KOL pickup despite 14k impressions
verdicts.reasoning: Coordinated launch hype that decoupled from organic interest within hours of the peak. The creator going quiet right as engagement craters is the classic exit-prep pattern. Confidence is mid because the shilling clusters are clear but the dataset is small (one platform, ~140 posts).

key_signals: Single holder at 70.79% concentration — unilateral dump risk
Top-10 holders control ~95% of real supply (excluding LP)
Only $5,659 total market liquidity — <$1k sell would crater price
Zero independent LP providers; 100% of LP from pump.fun bonding curve
No insider-network flag from RugCheck, but moot given concentration
Single AMM (pump.fun) — no exit redundancy if curve is gamed
verdicts.reasoning: Capital structure is textbook high-risk: one dominant holder, razor-thin liquidity, single AMM. The pump.fun auto-lock prevents an LP rug, but does nothing against a coordinated holder dump — which is the actual exit vector here. Even a modest sell would cascade into a death spiral against this pool depth.
